caption: A woman with short dark hair stands in a room giving a presentation. She is wearing a black blazer over a white t-shirt with text on it and holds a tablet in her left hand. Behind her, a projector displays a grayscale image of an industrial setting with a person working, accompanied by the text "data as Taylorism". A person wearing a yellow shirt and a green beanie is seated in the foreground, facing the presenter. A black chair sits to the right of the screen. Throughout the sequence, the woman gestures with her right hand while speaking, shifting her posture slightly and looking between her tablet and the audience. The projection remains static on the wall, and the seated person remains still, maintaining their focus on the presentation.
